positive: A maximalist, yet highly stylized and clean vector graphic of interconnected floral and celestial elements. Focus on a central mandala arrangement composed of stylized cosmic dust clouds, blossoming geometric lilies, crescent moons, and shooting stars. The style should emulate Art Deco stained glass mixed with modern botanical illustration, featuring strong, clean outlines and limited color palette of deep indigo, gold foil accents, midnight blue, and burnt sienna. The composition must be centrally balanced, highly symmetrical, and designed for maximum contrast on a fabric background. Clean silhouette, intricate detailing, repeating pattern potential, high saturation, vector art, print quality, graphic novel aesthetic.
